params.extra_check: CRITICAL: In DevTools Network tab, right-click on column headers and enable the Protocol column. Then submit the prompt and check SPECIFICALLY what protocol batchexecute uses: h2 or h3. Do NOT check signaler-pa — check the batchexecute request to gemini.google.com. Also report the exact Remote Address (IP:port) for batchexecute. Screenshot must show Protocol column.

notes: Gemini protocol PRECISION check. On 3/20 gemini.google.com was h2-intercepted by etap but not on 3/24. Need to confirm if batchexecute switched to h3/QUIC. Check Protocol column for batchexecute specifically, not signaler-pa.
